text: Network Access Control Lists (NACL) @ wssemaniic © s Because NACLs are stateless each communication needs 1 REQUEST rule and 1 RESPONSE rule app port (tcp/??) : ] & HE Ephemeral port u @ (tcp/1024-65535) These rule-pairs (app port & ephemeral ports) are needed on each NACL for each communication type which occurs 1) within a VPC, 2) TO a VPC or 3) FROM a VPC
